instructions.content: NEVER add a rule without first reading existing .agents/RULES.md — blind appending creates duplicates and violates the single-source-of-truth contract.
NEVER accept a rule without a clear Directive (ALWAYS/NEVER phrasing) and Rationale — vague rules fail the precision requirement and confuse future readers.
Load .agents/RULES.md before adding any new rule. Check the entire file — rules are entries under '### Rule:' headings.
When the user says 'Remember this', do NOT create a rule — route to vault-capture instead. Rules management is for behavioural directives only, not ephemeral notes or memory.
